description: Scaffold brand-new DatoCMS plugin projects with datocms-plugin-sdk and connect(). Use when users want to create a new plugin folder from scratch, bootstrap the Vite/React package structure, choose initial plugin surfaces such as field extensions, config screens, sidebars, pages, asset sources, or dropdown actions, and wire the first hook implementation. Prefer `datocms-plugin-builder` for edits to an existing plugin project.

results.query: Scaffold a new DatoCMS plugin project from scratch with the right package.json, Vite files, and connect() entrypoint.
Create a new private DatoCMS plugin folder that starts with a sidebar panel for SEO checks.
Bootstrap a marketplace DatoCMS plugin package with a config screen and the correct datocms-plugin npm metadata.
Start a fresh DatoCMS plugin project that adds an asset source for Unsplash imports.
Patch this existing DatoCMS plugin config screen to remove one setting field.
Add one more dropdown action to our current DatoCMS plugin project.
Write a DatoCMS CMA script to upload images from URLs.
Show how to render DatoCMS structured text in a React front end.
Scaffold a new DatoCMS plugin with a config screen that already feels native to the DatoCMS UI.
Use datocms-plugin-scaffold to create a new DatoCMS plugin project with Vite, React, and a connect() entrypoint.
Use datocms-plugin-scaffold to bootstrap a new marketplace-ready DatoCMS plugin with a config screen and sidebar panel.
Use datocms-plugin-scaffold to patch this existing DatoCMS plugin config screen and remove one setting field.
